description: Warning payload: the warning view kind has no block fields — all warning data stays in the header JSON. This verifies that non-error, non-content payloads are rendered cleanly as header-only output.

input.warning: The option '--legacy-view' is ignored; use '--output readable-view' for the default readable format.
guidance: Run with --help to see current options.

assertions.value: The option '--legacy-view' is ignored; use '--output readable-view' for the default readable format.
